title: Rotate component on 2 axis
description: You can rotate components with on 2 axes now before placement. Hold control and scroll before placing any component to activate 2nd axe.

title: Guild base 10k global cap
description: The total limit for components placed across all areas within the Guild Base is 10 000

title: Guild base 10k density cap
description: Increase 10K density cap components (local area) in guild base

title: No density cap in solo
description: Lifted density cap components in solo base

title: Change clock guild time
description: Will apply to anyone in the guild. Need the Management permission.

title: Searchable component
description: Can search component by their name

title: Favorite tab component
description: Can tag components in favorite tab

title: Pick up, replace, rotate component
description: You can now move, replace, rotate components after placement

title: Other players can place diagram
description: Any player with permission can place a diagram/blueprint where you can fill components in your solo world or base guild
notes: Many people are not aware of shared blueprint functions

title: Copyright diagram claim is above 70%
description: You need to be the owner of at least 70% components of the diagram
notes: This is considered as a bug for WBM see Bugs page

title: Increased guild fund overcap to 5500K when going over budget
description: Before we lost money when erasing the guild base and reputing a guild diagram back. Now we can go up to 5500K
notes: Not sure about the exact amount but going up to 5.5 million should be safe

title: Can build much further from your charcter
